yourHomeBase: Your home base for the magic near Orlando's best theme parks.
heroSubtitle: Close to Disney World, Universal Studios, LEGOLAND & SeaWorld. Book direct — no Airbnb fees, no surprises.
aboutDescription: Our properties are located in the Four Corners/Kissimmee area, which puts you just 15-25 minutes from Walt Disney World, Universal Studios, LEGOLAND, and SeaWorld. Some homes are among the closest non-resort accommodations to the parks.
travelTimesDisclaimer: * Travel times are approximate and will vary depending on the time of year, local events, and traffic conditions. These times do not include LEGOLAND.
homesDescription: Spacious, fully-equipped vacation homes — many with private pools, game rooms, and themed bedrooms — all minutes from Orlando's world-famous theme parks.
roomsDescription: From shared home stays to family resort suites — our individually styled rooms bring the magic of the parks right to your doorstep.
everythingYouNeedReadyOnArrival: Everything You Need, Ready on Arrival
everyHomeArrivesStocked: Every home includes a fully equipped kitchen, private pool, high-speed Wi-Fi, free parking, smart TVs, washer & dryer, and complimentary starter supplies (toiletries, coffee, basic pantry items). Most properties also include air conditioning, heating, and cable TV.
starterSuppliesAreComplimentary: Starter supplies are complimentary. Guests are responsible for additional groceries. Publix & Walmart are all within minutes of every property.
teaKettleToasterBlenderCoffeeMaker: Tea kettle, toaster, blender & coffee maker
sugarCreamerSweetenerSaltPepperOil: Sugar, creamer, sweetener, salt, pepper & oil
dishSoapSpongePaperTowelsBinBags: Dish soap, sponge, paper towels & bin bags
twoRollsOfToiletPaperPerBathroom: 2 rolls of toilet paper per bathroom
twoHandTowelsHandSoapPerBathroom: 2 hand towels & hand soap per bathroom
conditioningShampooShowerGelHandLotion: Conditioning shampoo, shower gel & hand lotion
oneBathTowelWashClothPerGuest: 1 bath towel & wash cloth per guest
privateScreenedInPoolWhenNotated: Pool (private or shared) at most homes
medievalTimesDescription: Cheer on your knight while feasting on a four-course meal at this legendary dinner tournament show.
wildFloridaDescription: Glide through the Florida Everglades on a thrilling airboat tour and spot alligators in their natural habitat.
kennedySpaceCenterDescription: Walk among real rockets, meet astronauts, and experience the awe-inspiring Space Shuttle Atlantis exhibit at America"s premier space exploration destination.
iconParkDescription: Orlando"s premier entertainment destination on International Drive — featuring The Wheel observation ride, Sea Life Aquarium, Madame Tussauds, dining, and live entertainment all in one vibrant complex.
dinosaurWorldDescription: Walk among over 200 life-size dinosaur sculptures in a lush outdoor setting. Dig for fossils, explore a prehistoric playground, and discover the world of dinosaurs just a short drive from Orlando.
gatorlandDescription: The Alligator Capital of the World! See thousands of alligators and crocodiles, zip-line over gators, and more.
funSpotAmericaDescription: Orlando"s hometown amusement park featuring roller coasters, go-karts, arcade games, and family-friendly rides.
wonderWorksOrlandoDescription: Step inside the famous upside-down building on International Drive for 35,000 sq ft of hands-on science experiments, a 4D XD motion theatre, laser tag, a glow-in-the-dark ropes course, and over 100 interactive exhibits for all ages.
connectYouWithBestPrices: We"ll connect you with the best available prices.
theMostMagicalPlaceOnEarth: The Most Magical Place on Earth
disneyWorldDescription: Experience the magic of Cinderella Castle, thrilling rides, beloved characters, and unforgettable fireworks at the world"s most iconic theme park resort.
universalStudiosDescription: Step into your favorite films and TV shows at Universal Studios and Islands of Adventure, home to The Wizarding World of Harry Potter and Epic Universe.
seaWorldOrlandoDescription: Encounter incredible marine life, soar on world-class roller coasters, and experience the thrill of Mako — one of Florida"s tallest, fastest coasters.
builtForKidsLovedByFamilies: Built for Kids. Loved by Families.
legolandFloridaDescription: A world built entirely of LEGO bricks! Perfect for families with children ages 2–12, featuring over 50 rides, shows, and interactive attractions.
youllBeTakenToTicketPartner: You"ll be taken to our ticket partner for the best prices.
purchaseDiscountedTickets: Purchase discounted theme park tickets directly through us and save time and money. We"ve partnered with all four major Orlando parks to bring you the best prices.
earlyCheckInDescription: Check in before 3 PM and start your vacation early
lateCheckoutDescription: Extend your checkout time until 7 PM
caseOfWaterDescription: 24-pack of bottled water in your home
freshFlowersDescription: Beautiful fresh flower arrangement for your arrival
welcomeBasketDescription: Snacks, treats, and local goodies to welcome you
groceryPreStockingDescription: We"ll stock your fridge with essentials before arrival
midStayCleaningDescription: Professional cleaning service during your stay
parkingPassDescription: Secure parking pass for theme park visits
themeParkTransportationDescription: Round-trip shuttle service to major theme parks
pleaseLogInToCheckout: Please log in to proceed with checkout
failedToCreateCheckout: Failed to create checkout session. Please try again.
enhanceYourStayDescription: Add special services, welcome amenities, and activities to make your vacation unforgettable. Book these add-ons before or after your reservation.
managementDescription: Are you a homeowner in the Orlando area looking for a better way to manage your vacation rental? Theme Park Stays offers a full-service property management solution that earns you more while doing less. As a locally owned company, we bring a personal touch that national chains simply can't match.
earnMorePayLessDesc: Our commission rate is significantly lower than the national average — meaning more money stays in your pocket every single month.
dynamicPricingDesc: Our AI-powered pricing engine adjusts your rates in real-time based on local events, park calendars, and demand patterns to maximize your revenue.
locallyOwnedOperatedDesc: We're Orlando locals — not a faceless corporation. We know the market, the neighborhoods, and what guests truly want from an Orlando vacation.
completelyHandsOffDesc: From guest communication and check-ins to cleaning and maintenance — we handle everything so you can sit back and collect your income.
fiveStarGuestServiceDesc: Our concierge team delivers exceptional guest experiences, resulting in glowing 5-star reviews that boost your property's visibility and bookings.
transparentReportingDesc: Access real-time dashboards showing your occupancy rates, revenue, and guest reviews. No surprises — just clear, honest performance data.
designDescription: Whether you want to go all out with an immersive theme or create a sleek, elegant retreat — our in-house design team specializes in vacation rental transformations that dramatically increase your property"s appeal and nightly rates.
goAllOutWithATheme: Go All Out with a Theme
themedTransformationsDesc: Transform your property into an immersive themed experience — Disney magic, Harry Potter wizardry, Star Wars adventure, or any world your guests can dream of. Our design team creates jaw-dropping, Instagram-worthy spaces that command premium nightly rates.
elegantLuxuryDesignDesc: Prefer a more refined, upscale aesthetic? Our luxury design service creates sophisticated spaces with premium materials, curated art, and timeless elegance that appeals to discerning travelers seeking a high-end resort experience.
freeConsultationDesc: We visit your property and discuss your vision, budget, and goals.
designProposalDesc: Our team creates a detailed design plan with mood boards and cost estimates.
transformationDesc: Our skilled contractors and designers bring the vision to life.
launchListDesc: Professional photography and listing optimization to maximize bookings.
readyToTransform: Ready to transform your property and maximize your rental income?
sarahMikeThompsonReview: Absolutely incredible experience! The house was stunning, the pool was perfect, and we were at Disney's gates in 8 minutes. The team helped us plan our entire park itinerary. We're already planning our return trip!
rodriguezFamilyReview: This was our 3rd time staying with Theme Park Stays and it gets better every visit. The game room kept the kids entertained on our rest day, and the team got us discounted Universal tickets. Highly recommend!
jenniferWalshReview: Booked the Castle Suite for my daughter's birthday and she was absolutely blown away. The themed decor was magical, the location was perfect, and the booking process was so much easier than Airbnb. Will definitely be back!
